title: TheAlest Silent Addons
description: Addon to Silent Gear, implementing mods like Iron's Spell and Spellbook
body:
Mod for adding new Materials and Traits to Silent Gear, with a main focus on using damage types from Iron's Spell and Spellbook.

Content:
<details>
<summary>Iron's Spell And Spellbook</summary>
Material Properties of:

- Lighning Potion
- Blood Vial
- Fire Ale
- Frozen Bone
- Divine Pearl
- Arcane Essence
- Arcane Cloth

New Damage Traits.

Adding Innate Resistance to many mobs and some modded ones:
- Luminous
- Ender Zoology
- Creeper and Enderman Overhaul 
</details>


<details>
<summary>Vanilla</summary>
Material Properties of:
  
-  Glass
-  Magma Block
-  Armadillo Scute
-  Gunpowder
</details>

You need Iron's 3.14.3, which can't be found on Modrinth untill the author updates the mod here too.
